verses.geez:
ወእምዝ ፡ ወረደ ፡ ይሁዳ ፡ በእማንቱ ፡ መዋዕል ፡ እምኀበ ፡ አኀዊሁ ፡ ወኀደረ ፡ ኀበ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ አዶላማዊ ፡ ዘስሙ ፡
                  ኤ[ራ]ስ ።

translations.lxx: And it came to pass at that time that Judas went down from his brethren, and came as far as to a certain man of Odollam, whose name was Iras.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass at that time, that Judah went down from his brethren, and turned in to a certain Adullamite, whose name was Hirah.

verses.geez: ወርእየ ፡ አሐተ ፡ ወለተ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ከናናዊ ፡ ወስማ ፡ ሤዋ ፡ ወነሥኣ ፡ ወአውሰባ ።

translations.lxx: And Judas saw there the daughter of a Chananitish man, whose name was Sava; and he took her, and went in to her.
translations.kjv: And Judah saw there a daughter of a certain Canaanite, whose name was Shuah; and he took her, and went in unto her.

verses.geez: ወፀንሰት ፡ ወወለደት ፡ ወልደ ፡ ወሰመየቶ ፡ ስሞ ፡ ዔር ።

translations.lxx: And she conceived and bore a son, and called his name, Er.
translations.kjv: And she conceived, and bare a son; and he called his name Er.

verses.geez: ወፀንሰት ፡ ዓዲ ፡ ወወለደት ፡ ወልደ ፡ ወሰመየቶ ፡ ስሞ ፡ አውናን ።

translations.lxx: And she conceived and bore a son again; and called his name, Aunan.
translations.kjv: And she conceived again, and bare a son; and she called his name Onan.

verses.geez:
ወዓዲ ፡ ደገመት ፡ ወወለደት ፡ ወልደ ፡ ወሰመይዎ ፡ ስሞ ፡ ሴሎም ፤ በውስተ ፡ ብሔር ፡ ዘስሙ ፡ ኮሰቤ ፡ ሀለወት ፡
                  አመ ፡ ወለደቶሙ ።

translations.lxx: And she again bore a son; and called his name, Selom: and she was in Chasbi when she bore them.
translations.kjv: And she yet again conceived, and bare a son; and called his name Shelah: and he was at Chezib, when she bare him.

verses.geez: ወነሥአ ፡ ይሁዳ ፡ ብእሲተ ፡ ለወልዱ ፡ ለዔር ፡ በኵሩ ፡ እንተ ፡ ስማ ፡ ትዕማር ።

translations.lxx: And Judas took a wife for Er his first-born, whose name was Thamar.
translations.kjv: And Judah took a wife for Er his firstborn, whose name was Tamar.

verses.geez: ወኮነ ፡ ዔር ፡ በኵሩ ፡ ለይሁዳ ፡ እኩየ ፡ በቅድመ ፡ እግዚብሔር ፡ ወቂተሎ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And Er, the first-born of Judas, was wicked before the Lord; and God killed him.
translations.kjv: And Er, Judah’s firstborn, was wicked in the sight of the LORD; and the LORD slew him.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎ ፡ ይሁዳ ፡ ለአውናን ፡ ባእ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ብእሲተ ፡ እኁከ ፡ ወተሐመዋ ፡ ወአቅም ፡ ዘርአ ፡ ለእኁከ ።

translations.lxx: And Judas said to Aunan, Go in to thy brother's wife, and marry her as her brother-in-law, and raise up seed to thy brother.
translations.kjv: And Judah said unto Onan, Go in unto thy brother’s wife, and marry her, and raise up seed to thy brother.

verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ አእመረ ፡ አውናን ፡ ከመ ፡ ኢኮነ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ዘርእ ፡ ሶበ ፡ ቦአ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ብእሲተ ፡ እኁሁ ፡ ይክዑ ፡ ዲበ
                  ፡ ምድር ፡ ከመ ፡ ኢየሀብ ፡ ዘርአ ፡ ለእኁሁ ።

translations.lxx: And Aunan, knowing that the seed should not be his—it came to pass when he went in to his brother's wife, that he spilled it upon the ground, so that he should not give seed to his brother's wife.
translations.kjv: And Onan knew that the seed should not be his; and it came to pass, when he went in unto his brother’s wife, that he spilled it on the ground, lest that he should give seed to his brother.

verses.geez: ወእኩየ ፡ ኮነ ፡ ውእቱኒ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ እስመ ፡ ከመዝ ፡ ገብረ ፡ ወቀተሎ ፡ ሎቱኒ ።

translations.lxx: And his doing this appeared evil before God; and he slew him also.
translations.kjv: And the thing which he did displeased the LORD: wherefore he slew him also.

verses.geez:
ወይቤላ ፡ ይሁዳ ፡ ለትዕማር ፡ መርዓቶሙ ፡ ንበሪ ፡ ማዕሰብኪ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ቤተ ፡ አቡኪ ፡ እስከ ፡ ይልህቅ ፡ ሴሎም ፡
                  ወልድየ ፡ እስመ ፡ ይቤ ፡ ዮጊ ፡ ይመውትኒ ፡ ዝኒ ፡ ከመ ፡ አኀዊሁ ፡ ወሖረት ፡ ትዕማር ፡ ወነበረት ፡ ቤተ ፡ አቡሃ ።

translations.lxx: And Judas said to Thamar, his daughter-in-law, Sit thou a widow in the house of thy father-in-law, until Selom my son be grown; for he said, Lest he also die as his brethren; and Thamar departed, and sat in the house of her father.
translations.kjv: Then said Judah to Tamar his daughter in law, Remain a widow at thy father’s house, till Shelah my son be grown: for he said, Lest peradventure he die also, as his brethren did. And Tamar went and dwelt in her father’s house.

verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ ተፈጸመ ፡ መዋዕሊሃ ፡ ሞተት ፡ ሤዋ ፡ ብእሲተ ፡ ይሁዳ ፡ ወነጊፎ ፡ ላሐ ፡ ይሁዳ ፡ ዐርገ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ይቀርፅ
                  ፡ አባግዒሁ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወዔራስ ፡ ኖላዊሁ ፡ [አዶላማዊ ፡] ውስተ ፡ ቴ[ምና] ።

translations.lxx: And the days were fulfilled, and Sava the wife of Judas died; and Judas, being comforted, went to them that sheared his sheep, himself and Iras his shepherd the Odollamite, to Thamna.
translations.kjv: And in process of time the daughter of Shuah Judah’s wife died; and Judah was comforted, and went up unto his sheepshearers to Timnath, he and his friend Hirah the Adullamite.

verses.geez: ወአይድዕዋ ፡ ለትዕማር ፡ መርዓቶሙ ፡ ወይቤልዋ ፡ ናሁ ፡ ሐሙኪ ፡ የዐርግ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ቴ[ምና] ፡ ይቅርፅ ፡ አባግዒሁ ።

translations.lxx: And it was told Thamar his daughter-in-law, saying, Behold, thy father-in-law goeth up to Thamna, to shear his sheep.
translations.kjv: And it was told Tamar, saying, Behold thy father in law goeth up to Timnath to shear his sheep.

verses.geez:
ወኀደገት ፡ አልባሲሃ ፡ ዘመበለታ ፡ ወለብሰት ፡ ሞጣሕታ ፡ ወተንሥአት ፡ ወነበረት ፡ ውስተ ፡ አንቀጽ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ፍኖት
                  ፡ ዘቴ[ምና] ፡ እስመ ፡ ርእየት ፡ ከመ ፡ ልህቀ ፡ ሴሎም ፡ ወውእቱሰ ፡ ኢፈቀደ ፡ የሀባ ፡ ኪያሃ ፡ ትኩኖ ፡ ብእሲተ ።

translations.lxx: And having taken off the garments of her widowhood from her, she put on a veil, and ornamented her face, and sat by the gates of Ænan, which is in the way to Thamna, for she saw that Selom was grown; but he gave her not to him for a wife.
translations.kjv: And she put her widow’s garments off from her, and covered her with a vail, and wrapped herself, and sat in an open place, which is by the way to Timnath; for she saw that Shelah was grown, and she was not given unto him to wife.

verses.geez: ወሶበ ፡ ርእያ ፡ ይሁዳ ፡ አም[ሰላ] ፡ ዘማ ፡ እስመ ፡ ተገልበበት ፡ ገጻ ፡ ወኢያእመራ ።

translations.lxx: And when Judas saw her, he thought her to be a harlot; for she covered her face, and he knew her not.
translations.kjv: When Judah saw her, he thought her to be an harlot; because she had covered her face.

verses.geez:
ወተግሕሠ ፡ ኀቤሃ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ፍኖት ፡ ወይቤላ ፡ አብእኒ ፡ ኀቤኪ ፡ ወትቤሎ ፡ ምንተ ፡ ትሁበኒ ፡ እመ ፡ ቦእከ ፡
                  ኀቤየ ።

translations.lxx: And he went out of his way to her, and said to her, Let me come in to thee; for he knew not that she was his daughter-in-law; and she said, What wilt thou give me if thou shouldest come in to me?
translations.kjv: And he turned unto her by the way, and said, Go to, I pray thee, let me come in unto thee; (for he knew not that she was his daughter in law.) And she said, What wilt thou give me, that thou mayest come in unto me?

verses.geez:
ወይቤላ ፡ አነ ፡ እፌኑ ፡ ለኪ ፡ ማሕስአ ፡ ጠሊ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ አባግዒነ ፡ ወትቤሎ ፡ ሀበኒ ፡ አኅዘ ፡ እስከ ፡ ትፌኑ
                  ፡ ሊተ ።

translations.lxx: And he said, I will send thee a kid of the goats from my flock; and she said, Well, if thou wilt give me an earnest, until thou send it.
translations.kjv: And he said, I will send thee a kid from the flock. And she said, Wilt thou give me a pledge, till thou send it?

verses.geez:
ወይቤላ ፡ ምንተ ፡ እሁበኪ ፡ አኅዘ ፡ ወትቤሎ ፡ ሕልቀተከ ፡ ወቆብዐከ ፡ ወበትረከ ፡ እንተ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እዴከ ፡ ወወሀባ
                  ፡ ወቦአ ፡ ኀቤሃ ፡ ወፀንሰት ።

translations.lxx: And he said, What is the earnest that I shall give thee? and she said, Thy ring, and thy bracelet, and the staff in thy hand; and he gave them to her, and went in to her, and she conceived by him.
translations.kjv: And he said, What pledge shall I give thee? And she said, Thy signet, and thy bracelets, and thy staff that is in thine hand. And he gave it her, and came in unto her, and she conceived by him.

verses.geez: ወተንሥአት ፡ ወሖረት ፡ ወአንበረት ፡ ውእተ ፡ አልባሲሃ ፡ ወለብሰት ፡ አልባሰ ፡ መበለታ ።

translations.lxx: And she arose and departed, and took her veil from off her, and put on the garments of her widowhood.
translations.kjv: And she arose, and went away, and laid by her vail from her, and put on the garments of her widowhood.

verses.geez:
ወፈነወ ፡ ላቲ ፡ ይሁዳ ፡ ውእተ ፡ ማሕስአ ፡ ጠሊ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ኖላዊሁ ፡ አዶ[ላ]ማዊ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይንሣእ ፡ አኅዞ ፡
                  እምኀበ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ብእሲት ፡ ወኢረከባ ።

translations.lxx: And Judas sent the kid of the goats by the hand of his shepherd the Odollamite, to receive the pledge from the woman; and he found her not.
translations.kjv: And Judah sent the kid by the hand of his friend the Adullamite, to receive his pledge from the woman’s hand: but he found her not.

verses.geez:
ወተስእለ ፡ ለሰብአ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ብሔር ፡ ወይቤ ፡ አይቴ ፡ ዛቲ ፡ ዘማ ፡ እንተ ፡ ነበረት ፡ ውስተ ፡ ፍኖት ፡ ወይቤልዎ
                  ፡ አልቦቱ ፡ ዝየሰ ፡ ዘማ ።

translations.lxx: And he asked the men of the place, Where is the harlot who was in Ænan by the way-side? and they said, There was no harlot here.
translations.kjv: Then he asked the men of that place, saying, Where is the harlot, that was openly by the way side? And they said, There was no harlot in this place.

verses.geez: ወገብአ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ይሁዳ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፡ ኢረከብክዋ ፡ ወሰብአ ፡ ውእቱኒ ፡ ብሔር ፡ ይቤሉኒ ፡ አልቦ ፡ ዝየሰ ፡ ዘማ ።

translations.lxx: And he returned to Judas, and said, I have not found her; and the men of the place say, There is no harlot here.
translations.kjv: And he returned to Judah, and said, I cannot find her; and also the men of the place said, that there was no harlot in this place.

verses.geez:
ወይቤ ፡ ይሁዳ ፡ ኅዱግዎ ፡ ላቲ ፡ አላ ፡ ከመ ፡ ኢይሥሐቁ ፡ ላዕሌነ ፡ ፈነውኩ ፡ አንሰ ፡ ማሕስአሂ ፡ ወሶበ ፡
                  ኢረከብካሃሰ ፡ ኮነ ።

translations.lxx: And Judas said, Let her have them, but let us not be ridiculed; I sent this kid, but thou hast not found her.
translations.kjv: And Judah said, Let her take it to her, lest we be shamed: behold, I sent this kid, and thou hast not found her.

verses.geez:
ወእምዝ ፡ እምድኅረ ፡ ሠለስቱ ፡ አውራኅ ፡ ዜነውዎ ፡ ለይሁዳ ፡ ወይቤልዎ ፡ ዘመወት ፡ ትዕማር ፡ መርዓትክሙ ፡ ወናሁ ፡
                  ፀንሰት ፡ በዝሙት ፡ ወይቤ ፡ ይሁዳ ፡ ያውፅእዋ ፡ ወያውዕይዋ ።

translations.lxx: And it came to pass after three months, that it was told Judas, saying, Thamar thy daughter-in-law has grievously played the harlot, and behold she is with child by whoredom; and Judas said, Bring her out, and let her be burnt.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass about three months after, that it was told Judah, saying, Tamar thy daughter in law hath played the harlot; and also, behold, she is with child by whoredom. And Judah said, Bring her forth, and let her be burnt.

verses.geez:
ወእንዘ ፡ ይወስድዋ ፡ ለአከት ፡ ኀበ ፡ ሐሙሃ ፡ ወትቤሎ ፡ ዝንቱአ ፡ ዘመኑአ ፡ ወዘአይኑአ ፡ ብእሲአ ፡ ዝንቱአ ፡
                  ፅንስአ ፡ ወትቤሎ ፡ ርኢአ ፡ ዘንተአ ፡ ቆብዐአ ፡ ወዘንተአ ፡ በትረአ ።

translations.lxx: And as they were bringing her, she sent to her father-in-law, saying, I am with child by the man whose these things are; and she said, See whose is this ring and bracelet and staff.
translations.kjv: When she was brought forth, she sent to her father in law, saying, By the man, whose these are, am I with child: and she said, Discern, I pray thee, whose are these, the signet, and bracelets, and staff.

verses.geez:
ወርእየ ፡ ይሁዳ ፡ ወይቤ ፡ ጸድቅት ፡ ትዕማር ፡ እምኔየ ፡ እስመ ፡ ኢወሀብክዋ ፡ ሴሎምሃ ፡ ወልድየ ፡ (ወኀደጋ ፡
                  ቀቲሎታ ፡ እንከ ፡) ወኢደገመ ፡ ይሁዳ ፡ ቀሪቦታ ።

translations.lxx: And Judas knew them, and said, Thamar is cleared rather than I, forasmuch as I gave her not to Selom my son: and he knew her not again.
translations.kjv: And Judah acknowledged them, and said, She hath been more righteous than I; because that I gave her not to Shelah my son. And he knew her again no more.

verses.geez: ወኮነ ፡ ሶበ ፡ ወለደት ፡ ወመንታ ፡ ሀለወ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ከርሣ ።

translations.lxx: And it came to pass when she was in labour, that she also had twins in her womb.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass in the time of her travail, that, behold, twins were in her womb.

verses.geez:
ወእምዝ ፡ ሶበ ፡ ትወልድ ፡ [አውፅአ ፡ እዴሁ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ ወነሥአት ፡] መወልድ ፡ ወአሰረት ፡ ለየ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እዴሁ ፡
                  ወትቤ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ይቀድም ፡ ወፂአ ።

translations.lxx: And it came to pass as she was bringing forth, one thrust forth his hand, and the midwife having taken hold of it, bound upon his hand a scarlet thread, saying, This one shall come out first.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass, when she travailed, that the one put out his hand: and the midwife took and bound upon his hand a scarlet thread, saying, This came out first.

verses.geez: ወሶበ ፡ [አሰሰለ ፡ እዴሁ ፡ ወፅአ ፡ እኁሁ ፡ ወትቤ ፡ ዕፁብ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወሰመየቶ ፡ ስሞ ፡ ፋሬስ ።

translations.lxx: And when he drew back his hand, then immediately came forth his brother; and she said, Why has the barrier been cut through because of thee? and she called his name, Phares.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass, as he drew back his hand, that, behold, his brother came out: and she said, How hast thou broken forth? this breach be upon thee: therefore his name was called Pharez.

verses.geez: ወእምድኅሬሁ ፡] ወፅአ ፡ እኁሁኒ ፡ ወዝክቱሂ ፡ ዘውስተ ፡ እዴሁ ፡ ለይ ፡ ሰመየት ፡ ስሞ ፡ ዛራ ።

translations.lxx: And after this came forth his brother, on whose hand was the scarlet thread; and she called his name, Zara.
translations.kjv: And afterward came out his brother, that had the scarlet thread upon his hand: and his name was called Zarah.
